title: Cannot get multi-select to work on the forms.
excerpt: I cannot find the option to allow multi select on my lead submission form.  What am I missing?

posts.author: IslayOfSalem (Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml: I cannot find the option to allow multi select on my lead submission form. What am I missing?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: What’s the column type? ie if your column type is ‘status’ you can’t multi select. I’d recommend dropdown column type if you need multi select

posts.author: sirah (Sirah E)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @IslayOfSalem sirah here from Mindflows!

Have you tried clicking on the “+” arrow sign on your form and scroll down and look for “Multi-Select” please see screenshot below:

Screenshot 2025-04-10 at 10.41.45 AM930×780 53 KB

I hope this helps!
